name: Veterans Disability Compensation Retroactive Exclusion

eligibility.description: Uniformed services retirees who receive a retroactive award of disability compensation from the Department of Veterans Affairs.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Extends the statute of limitations to 1 year from the date of a VA disability determination to claim a refund for taxes paid on retired pay that is retroactively excluded from income.
